title: Add low-risk CSV content-type inference on the server
description:
Add low-risk server-side MIME inference for CSV so issue-linked CSV documents advertise a more specific content type.

## Background

The Web UI renderer selection should remain robust even when the server returns generic text-like content types, but `.csv` is a low-risk case where better MIME inference improves debuggability and keeps the server contract more expressive.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `infer_content_type()` returns `text/csv` for `.csv` paths and existing recognized extensions keep their current mappings.
- [ ] Issue-scoped and path-only document-content endpoints expose `text/csv` for CSV documents.
- [ ] Focused server tests cover the new CSV mapping without widening the scope to unrelated MIME work.
- [ ] The Web UI feature does not depend on adding source-code MIME mappings beyond what is proven necessary.

## Notes

Keep this task intentionally narrow; source-code path matching in the client remains the main dispatch mechanism for `.rs` and `.cpp`.
